prompt: Create a new full-body female xianxia cultivator hero for Samsara Ascension. Use the image just shown as the visual reference for style and mood only; do not copy the exact pose, face, or background. The character must read clearly as a controllable main hero in a cultivation roguelite.
scene: perfectly flat solid #FF00FF chroma-key background only, one uniform color, no shadows, no gradients, no texture, no floor plane, no lighting variation
subject: elegant young female cultivator, wood and sword spirit-root feeling, long dark hair, jade-and-gold hair ornament, pale jade forehead gem, white and light-jade daoist robes, translucent teal ribbons, warm gold trim, slim jade sword held close to the body, subtle qi aura hugging the silhouette
style: clean HD hand-painted 2D game character concept, polished fantasy RPG asset, crisp silhouette, controlled painterly detail, simplified fine details, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art
composition: full body visible, top-down 45-degree three-quarter RPG view, neutral hero pose, centered, generous padding, feet anchor visible, character occupies about 68 percent of the canvas
lighting: soft celestial glow, refined jade palace atmosphere, readable edge lighting for gameplay
palette: white, pale jade, teal, warm gold, dark ink hair; avoid magenta in the character
materials: silk robes, translucent ribbon accents, polished jade ornament, light brushed metal sword fittings
constraints: single character only; no scene background; no UI; no text; no watermark; no extra characters; no large detached spell effects; keep hair and ribbons inside the canvas; maintain game-readable silhouette; simplify micro details while preserving premium hand-painted look
negative: messy background, hyperreal skin pores, extreme jewelry detail, extra arms, extra weapons, cropped feet, oversized aura, purple-dominant palette
